summary: Content API migration testing completed successfully. All 22 backend tests passed. Frontend Drugs page correctly fetches data from API (164 drugs displayed). Authentication and subscription checks working correctly - expired users redirected to pricing page.

subscription_tests: GET /api/content/formulary returns 403 for expired subscription user
GET /api/content/formulary/{drug_id} returns 403 for expired subscription user
GET /api/content/renal-adjustments returns 403 for expired subscription user
GET /api/content/drug-categories works with auth only (no subscription needed)
GET /api/content/metadata works with auth only (no subscription needed)
data_integrity_tests: Formulary returns exactly 164 drugs (as expected from seeding)
Drug entries have required fields (id, name, category, route)
Single drug lookup returns correct drug (acetaminophen)
Metadata returns correct counts (164 formulary, 40 renal adjustments)
frontend_tests: Drugs page loads and displays 164 drugs from API
Search input is present and functional
Expired subscription user redirected to pricing page

critical_code_review_comments: Content API endpoints properly implement authentication via require_auth dependency
Subscription-gated endpoints use require_subscription which checks is_admin OR has_active_subscription
Frontend contentService.js correctly uses REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL and includes auth headers
DrugsPage.jsx properly handles loading, error, and success states
FormularyPage.jsx also refactored to use API - both pages working correctly
seed_data_creation: 164 drugs and 40 renal adjustments seeded to MongoDB (done by main agent)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Content migration feature is complete and working. Backend APIs at /api/content/* serve medical content from MongoDB. Frontend pages (DrugsPage.jsx, FormularyPage.jsx) fetch from these APIs. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_content_api.py covers all endpoints. Admin user has full access, expired subscription users are redirected to pricing.

features_verified.content_api_authentication: PASS - All endpoints require valid JWT token
features_verified.content_api_subscription_check: PASS - Formulary/renal endpoints return 403 for expired users
features_verified.content_api_admin_bypass: PASS - Admin users can access all content without subscription
features_verified.content_api_data_integrity: PASS - 164 drugs, 40 renal adjustments returned correctly
features_verified.frontend_api_integration: PASS - DrugsPage fetches and displays 164 drugs from API
features_verified.frontend_loading_state: PASS - Loading spinner shown while fetching
features_verified.frontend_error_handling: PASS - Expired users redirected to pricing page
